description_long: This is a tall, multi-stemmed cactus plant with elongated, ribbed green stems covered in small, evenly spaced spines. The cactus is planted in a simple, cylindrical pot that appears to be made of concrete, giving it a modern and minimalistic look. The stems vary in height and orientation, with some leaning outward and others standing more upright, creating a dynamic and natural appearance. The pot is plain and unadorned, with a smooth, matte gray finish that contrasts with the textured, spiky surface of the cactus. The plant is well-suited for urban environments, adding a touch of greenery and desert character to both indoor and outdoor spaces. No plant identification label or decorative elements are visible on the pot.
description: A tall, multi-stemmed cactus with ribbed green stems and spines, set in a plain gray concrete pot. The plant has a striking, modern look suitable for urban interiors or patios.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tallest cactus stem upright with several shorter stems clustered around it, all emerging from a plain gray pot.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the outward-leaning stems and the full spread of the cactus, making the plant appear wider and more dynamic.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the verticality of the tallest stem and shows the ribbed texture and spines more clearly, with the pot's round shape visible.
description_view_3: This side reveals the arrangement of the stems, with some leaning to the left and right, and the pot's smooth, unadorned surface.
